title: Multi-Source RAG Pipeline Architecture
subtitle: Multi-Provider RAG Pipeline Architecture
description: Agent systems need to retrieve information from multiple knowledge sources, with different scenarios suited to different RAG backends (vector retrieval, knowledge graphs, multimodal). This domain addresses how to design pluggable RAG pipelines that allow each knowledge base to independently select the optimal retrieval strategy.
sub_problems: Unified interface design for multiple RAG backends
Componentized orchestration of document parsing → chunking → embedding → indexing
best_practices: Maintain independent configuration for each knowledge base with runtime RAG provider switching support
